since_last: 38% of 100 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.08%; AI bubble risk 51 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 38% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.42% · BTC +0.99% · Gold -0.27% · Nasdaq100 +0.33%. 38% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.08%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.08%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -3.46%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +13.44%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +13.44%, META +6.02%, NVDA +3.91%, CGNX +3.36%, NXE +3.16%. Laggards: OKTA -7.08%, CRWD -5.70%, MDB -5.54%, ZS -5.28%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.26% at $145.68
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.26% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 51 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 51/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
